sn56.12:0.2: 2. The Setting in Motion of the Wheel of *Dhamma* Chapter [*Dhammacakkappavattanavagga*]
sn56.12:1.1: “‘This is the noble truth of *dukkha*,’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas, regarding *dhammas* unheard of before, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:1.2: ‘This noble truth of *dukkha* is to be fully understood,’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas previously … arose.
sn56.12:1.3: ‘This noble truth of *dukkha* has been fully understood,’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas, regarding *dhammas* unheard of before, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:2.1: ‘This is the noble truth of the origin of *dukkha* [*dukkhasamudayaṁ*],’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas, regarding *dhammas* unheard of before, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:2.2: ‘This noble truth of the origin of *dukkha* [*dukkhasamudayaṁ*] is to be abandoned,’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas previously … arose.
sn56.12:2.3: ‘This noble truth of the origin of *dukkha* [*dukkhasamudayaṁ*] has been abandoned,’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas, regarding *dhammas* unheard of before, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:3.1: ‘This is the noble truth of the cessation of *dukkha* [*dukkhanirodhaṁ*],’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas, regarding *dhammas* unheard of before, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:3.2: ‘This noble truth of the cessation of *dukkha* [*dukkhanirodhaṁ*] is to be realized,’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas previously … arose.
sn56.12:3.3: ‘This noble truth of the cessation of *dukkha* [*dukkhanirodhaṁ*] has been realized,’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas, regarding *dhammas* unheard of before, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:4.1: ‘This is the noble truth of the way leading to the cessation of *dukkha* [*dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā*],’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas, regarding *dhammas* unheard of before, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:4.2: ‘This noble truth of the way leading to the cessation of *dukkha* [*dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā*] is to be developed [*bhāvetabbaṁ*],’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas previously … arose.
sn56.12:4.3: ‘This noble truth of the way leading to the cessation of *dukkha* [*dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā*] has been developed [*bhāvitaṁ*],’ *bhikkhus*, for Tathāgatas, regarding *dhammas* unheard of before, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.”
